entry.title: Re: Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection Checklists
entry.content:
Hello Frauke and Uwe,

thank you for this documentation!

When I want to define the shop paper, I need to enter PRINT_PAPER in the field Form. This form, however, doesn't exist in the mandant where I do the customizing. Do you have the settings for this form so that I can create it?

Thanks and kind regards,

Kerstin

entry.title: Re: Set Default Home Page in SAC
entry.content:
1. Goto your application in edit mode -> share -> customize link -> remove link
  2. Goto your story -> share -> customize link -> type 'Homepage' in second input field -> save

entry.title: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Introduction

SSR activation and challenges behind are often misunderstands. This article will try to clarify as much as possible why SSR is not just like CSR in server side. 

We won't enter in technical optimisation details. Two great articles already did that:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/composable-storefront-ssr-performance-and-timeout-troubleshooting/ba-p/13574075
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/managing-performance-of-server-side-rendering-in-commerce-cloud/ba-p/13620636

The aim is to give you general understanding of different challenges and steps to achieve acceptable SSR performance.


NodeJS single-thread

One big misunderstanding is how SSR (NodeJs) is processing/rendering page content. Unlike CSR (Browser), NodeJS is single thread to handle multiple concurrent calls where Browser is handling one unique page rendering with multi-CPU/threads. 

In other words, hardware vertical scale cannot be executed to improve performance or to support more workload. Even worst, any page rendering must be optimized as much as possible to be executed as fast as possible by one unique CPU in order to let main thread handles next request as quick as possible. This queue task processing can easily lead you to timeout issue.

Two solutions must be applied :

  1. Tracking down non-optimal code processing in local environnement with SSR mode activated
  2. Add CDN caching at each SSR outputs

 

CDN Caching

As you understand in previously chapter, SSR outputs must be set in cache. Even more, SSR is not designed to handle concurrent calls. That point means SSR should serves one time each page and then CDN should serve the content. In other words :

  • Caching TTL must be longer as possible (at least one day)
  • Most of content must be designed for anonymous users (personalized content will be served by CSR re-hydratation).
  • CDN Caching size should be enough large to contain all websites pages

 

SSR Caching

When SSR is processing content, common data or/and calls can be executed to render any page as BaseSites for example. It is important to identify those parts and set them in local SSR caching.

 

OCC API Caching

SSR is executing same code as Browser to render a page. For that, it will need to do external call to fetch raw data (CMS Content, Product Content). SAP Commerce Cloud is exposing this data through OCC API. 

As other anonymous content, OCC API should be setup in cache to reduce processing/response time. And, as we already see, it is more impacting in SSR than CSR.

For caching, two different strategy can be applied :

  • OCC API caching (local at each node)
  • CDN caching (global for the solution)

OCC API caching reduces network latency but it increases memory consumption and caching warm up time. Where, CDN caching is increasing network latency (from 10 to 30ms), has some limitation with SNAT exhaustion and reduces caching warm up time.

When it is possible, CDN caching should be privileged.

 

WebCore vitals

Last but not least : the WebCore vitals, It is not rare to see better response time in CSR than SSR first. LCP and FCP are deeply impacted by CSR re-hydratation. 

When SSR first is activated, Browser will load firstly full page content from SSR output and then apply what we call CSR re-hydratation. If CSR has been badly implemented, the CSS and Images can be reloaded on top of SSR rendering. This overriding processing delays LCP / FCP response time. 

Solution is to debug closely how page is rendering by browser and see how CSR can be applied to enrich SSR rendering instead of overriding it.

 

Conclusion

SSR optimisation is complex topic and it can demand significant effort. You should not under estimate the complexity. SAP Commerce Composable Storefront is a headless framework solution that should help you to achieve easier this goal (and many others). However, the best practices must be respected.

SAP Expert Services can help you to apply those best practices and implement the needed optimisations.

entry.title: Re: First release of B2B Integration Factory – Integration Packages and their Extensions
entry.content:
Hi Gunther,

Thanks for the excellent blog!!

Any future updates to standard 'Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management V2' packages, will also be reflected in 'B2B Integration Factory - Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management' package?

entry.title: How to display LOB columns in Analysis for Office - AFO
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have one HANA table which stores the NLOB ( Long text values ) values & I am able to create a HANA CV on top of that table . 

HANA Studio level I can see that NLOB columns without any issues in Raw Data Tab using Data Preview.

The same HANA CV when I try to consume it via Analysis for Office - AFO , that NLOB column is not coming into the report structure & its automatically skipped it seems when adding data source into Work sheet. Do we need to enable anything at AFO level to see them ?

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
hi @David_Chaviano 

I fall in the following below categaries

People looking to switch their careers mid-life

People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

This certification attempt will lead me towards financial stability and career growth.

Thankyou in advance.

 

Regards,

Ahsan Rais

entry.title: Re: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content:
Have you seen this Performance Guide?

https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-performance-guide-for-developers/optimization-features-in-calculation-views

Is it helpful?

Regards,
--Witalij

entry.title: Re: Problem with updating fields in organization unit using c4codataapi
entry.content:
@leonardo_felini @prat2 

The root cause of the issue, is that the incoming value is the same with the current value in the object.

If you try to Patch passing the value <d:EndDate>9999-12-31T00:00:00</d:EndDate> without changing anything else and the current value is 9999-12-31T00:00:00 the request will fail, with the known error message.

If you try to pass the value 9999-12-30T00:00:00, that will work. I don't know why that happens, but makes no sense for a Patch request.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have implemented SAP CFL using custom drop-down list in BP T-code and backend it's saved BUT000 table everything working fine.  Captured under the one package and transported to quality and production.

Now we have an additional requirement add few more entries to the custom fields values table for the dropdown list. I have added and publish in SAP CFL it is working fine.

Now my concern is this additional requirement which is captured automatically in a new TR Contains all objects and not just the custom fields values added in the TR. 

Please confirm this is the Standard behaviors is there any way to Only Capture the custom field values changes in the TR.

Thanks

 

 

 

I have a required a requirement

entry.title: Re: How to use Action in a Task automation
entry.content:
Hi Koushik,

Thank you for your advice.

I've noticed something interesting. Although the action needs to be invoked through the Process initially, once the process is saved, the 'Action groups' become available in the right panel of the Task Automation window and the action can be used directly within the Automation window.

entry.title: Re: How to display LOB columns in Analysis for Office - AFO
entry.content: @TammyPowlas - Could you please help with the issue

entry.title: Celebrating Milestones with SAP Learning Hub: Your One-Stop-Shop for Upskilling and Career Growth
entry.content:
It’s only been a few months since SAP officially launched the enhanced SAP Learning Hub – but the success of the new premium, guided learning offering already shows that it’s exactly what future-oriented learners are looking for. So, let’s celebrate a couple of huge milestones with us today and learn more about why SAP Learning Hub is your one-stop-shop to learn a new skill, get certified, and boost your career in times of rapid technological innovations!

One Subscription is all You Need

In case you didn’t know it yet: The launch of the enhanced SAP Learning Hub marked a major step in the evolution of all things SAP solution learning. Knowing that tech changes faster than ever before – let’s just think about AI for a second! –, SAP professionals and those aspiring to become one need to quickly gain new skills, adapt to changing environments, and get certified faster to prove their expertise to (future) employers. That’s what the enhanced SAP Learning Hub is here for.

Providing access to great content, expert guidance in digital live sessions, on-demand hands-on practice systems, advanced analytics and learning management functionalities, plus four included SAP Certification exam attempts per learner per year, a subscription to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub ensures you stay relevant and ahead of the game. And apparently, it pays off.

Favorite Live Session Topic Comes as No Surprise

With more than 150,000 registrants in live sessions in 2024 so far, the popularity of this offer is increasing rapidly and continuously. And the year isn’t over yet! But with hundreds of sessions to choose from each month, opportunities to engage with live experts and participants from all over the world, we couldn’t be happier about the results!

And if you ever wondered about the most popular live session topics, take a look at the current Top 5 – which one is your favorite?

  • Artificial Intelligence
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
  • GROW with SAP
  • RISE with SAP
  • SAP Business Technology Platform, ABAP Environment

New Type of Practice System and More Enhancements

When you’re diving into a new SAP solution, it’s important to get a good first look at the software and how it’s running, right? That’s where another amazing feature of the enhanced SAP Learning Hub comes in: Practice systems.  There are more than 340 systems available to you – plus two sandbox systems – to explore, test, experiment and build use cases with your SAP solution.

And as we know you like to take your time exploring, we extended the system availability to 21 days for a couple of longer courses. Cool, huh? (If you want to learn more about practice systems, I highly recommend checking out this podcast).

And if you are interested in the most popular topics in SAP Learning Hub – let us unveil the secret: It’s of course SAP S/4HANA Cloud, both Private and Public Edition, and SAP’s future-ready enterprise resource planning (ERP) system. But SAP SuccessFactors is also very popular among users.

Still unsure about the benefits of SAP Learning Hub?

Then look no further! A recent study from Forrester now shows that upskilling with SAP Learning Hub helps customers gain the right skills critical to drive digital transformation – while also ensuring project success and maximizing the return on investment your organizations made with SAP solutions.

Forrester presented the following benefits of using SAP Learning Hub to upskill:

  • Improved upskilling due to greater learning access, resulting in productivity gains of up to 25%: As a source of extensive, high-quality, and digitally accessible guided SAP learning resources for those in more expert roles, SAP Learning Hub equipped users with the knowledge they need to stay up to speed and learn new skills.
  • Cost savings of 50% with digital delivery. Organizations find SAP Learning Hub to be a cost-effective solution that users can access anytime for self-paced training. It complements the organization’s existing training methods, which ultimately results in cost savings of $1.1 million over three years.
  • To learn more about the study, check out this blog post.

Bring out your best now

The enhanced SAP Learning Hub provides a comprehensive learning offering for you to gain new skills, access expert guidance, and get certified, ultimately boosting your career prospects and success in a rapidly evolving technological landscape. Make sure you bring out your best and get started today.

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP - INDEX of official blog posts
entry.content:
If you are looking for official blog posts published by the Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option product team, you have come to the right place.

We have joined all our blogs in the list below and will update with new blogs once they are released. Besides these blogs please also check out other interesting blogs colleagues and developers have written while working with our service. 

Enjoy your reading!

Blog Index:

Redis on SAP BTP - Introduction to start using the service
Redis on SAP BTP - Create a service instance in CF via BTP Cockpit
Redis on SAP BTP - Understanding service entitlements and metrics
Redis on SAP BTP - Connect to the instance from your local PC via SSH tunnel

Recently added:

Redis on SAP BTP - Update instance configuration parameters via CF Command Line Interface
Redis on SAP BTP - Populate a dataset to Redis cache instance using redis-cli data import

BTP Backing Services - Product Management

entry.title: Re: Create task in My Timesheet for EPPM Projects for uns...
entry.content: Work Packages only refer to Customer Projects.  Use the Other Accounting Object option and select an Enterprise project WBS.

entry.title: No data available or you do not have the necessary permission for External code in manage data
entry.content:
we are enabling AI features "AI-Assisted Skills Matching for Applicant Screening" ,while assigning business rule to Recruiting Billing and Subscription Configuration we are getting below error while selecting external code " Default billing and subscription and configuration"

No data available or you do not have the necessary permission

entry.title: Re: Investment Management Fiori Apps
entry.content: Hello! Did you find any fiori apps related to IM?

entry.title: Re: How to use side effects in RAP
entry.content:
Hello Andre,

maybe can you give me a hint what i need to do to achieve the following (or tell me that it is not possible atm).

I have a draft enabled complex RAP entity and on its object page, inline editing of its text table is possible. In the header section i show the root entities ID together with its localized text.

Is there a way to achieve that when i press enter after changing the text in logon language - means: saving draft is triggered - to also update the field in the header?

What works is changing the entry, pressing enter, navigating into it's details and back.

Talking about BTP ABAP 24xx.

Best regards,

Robert

entry.title: Re: Smart Data Streaming - File/Hadoop Json - Array Issue
entry.content: @Pai_N - You should post your question as a new thread both because you are using a different adapter than was discussed in this thread and because you are asking how to process the json payload rather than having an issue with the adapter retrieving the json file. Please also note that HANA streaming analytics will reach end of mainstream maintenance in 2025 and will not be extended. SAP is not recommending initiating any new projects using SAP HANA streaming analytics. https://me.sap.com/notes/3440255

entry.title: Re: Hello,Does anyone have information on the current S4H...
entry.content:
Hi Toni,

 

the current S4HANA SAP User License Model can be found here:

User Classification (sap.com)

The tool you are looking for is the STAR Service, described in this note:

3113382 - Authorization-based SAP S/4HANA User Simulation / FUE Projection - SAP for Me

 

You can still use your ECC licenses in a product conversion scenario, yes.

 

Best regards,

Torben

entry.title: Re: BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE:: M8 524 :: You cannot process conditions for delivery costs
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: CPI Connectivity to Microsft SQL Server using Open Connectors
entry.content: Hello ankit_mishra09, for the roles/access, is "usage" access is sufficient on the DB/Schema? This is allowing SAP CPI to read the data from snowflake. On the table, snowflake was given sAP CPI role on "select" and "update" permission.

entry.title: PRT availabilty check planned orders
entry.content:
Hey Gurus,

a customer I am currently working with raised the requirement that he wants to be able to check PRT availabilty for planned orders. As far as i know this availabily check is only possible for production orders right? Is there any way to check the PRT availability for planned orders? Their PRTs are maintained in the system as far as i know with a material master.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: TMS - Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CI/CPI) Content with Transport Management Service (TMS) a
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question about below diagram. Can anyone help me to understand what is the role of Destination 2 created in CAS subaccount pointing to CI service and what exactly this destination will be used for?

As per my understanding Destination 1 will help to bundle the artifacts by connecting to CAS and from CAS the bundle will be available for import to the next TEST NODE using Destination 3 and further Destination 4 and 5 are used to push the content to target CI tenants. 

Could you please correct me if my understand is wrong and also throw some light on usage of Destination2 mentioned below.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extension now available on the SAP Price List
entry.content: To all interested: you can find more information on using the multiple tenants here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Delete an attachment from "Manage Bank Accounts" Fiori app.
entry.content: Some wweks ago, i had the same question and i got answer from SAP. The button only works aslong the newly attached document is not saved. Then it is possible to delete this document. After saving it is only possible with transaction CV*. In my opinion this is not a user-friendly solution. But in the meantime the whole attachment thing works much better, but only in public cloud version of S/4HANA (f.e. https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-bank-account-administration-in-sap-s-4hana/managing-documents-in-the-manage-bank-accounts-fiori-app_b45d3833-61a7-42a9-8b4a-d22ac85c7a29).

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
trying to install composable storefront but getting following error while running command

ng add @Spartacus/schematics@latest

 

"require() of ES Module D:\js-storefront\mystore2211\node_modules\@angular\compiler\fesm2022\compiler.mjs not supported.
Instead change the require of D:\js-storefront\mystore2211\node_modules\@angular\compiler\fesm2022\compiler.mjs to a dynamic import() which is available in all CommonJS modules."

Please help me quickly

entry.title: How to assign Purchase Organization to Company Code in CBC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are unable to find an option to assign Purchase Organization to Company code in Set Up Organizational Structure.

Please help.

 

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to assign Purchase Organization to Company Code i...
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

It is not possible to assign Purchase Organization directly to Company Code, the assignment will look like this: Company Code -> Plant -> Purchase Organization.

You can assign Plant to your Company Code, then assign Purchase Organization to the Plant, this way the PO will be linked to the specific Company Code.

Below documents can help to understand this process:

SAP Help - Organizational Units

SAP Help - Purchasing Organization

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Hello,Does anyone have information on the current S4H...
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: Re: Automatic Selection parameters for FPY1
entry.content: You need to add the parameters first time and create one variant of it and assign the variant to the job and it will run every day.

entry.title: Headcount FTE Template returning duplicates
entry.content:
Hello

I've imported the "SF_EMP_Headcount_and_FTE_v2.0" Template and have everything working except the Headcount Trended table and chart on page 2 (FTE is not needed). The numbers are way off. When I look at the export of the data in the query we're getting duplicate rows for employees based on multiple event reasons throwing the numbers off. I've looked at filtering some event reasons out but nothing seems to work. Has anyone run into this? If so, what did you do to fix it?

entry.title: Re: Challenges with Field Extraction in Indian Invoices Using Document Information Extraction
entry.content: Hello Koushik, Thank you for reaching out to us. Since this involves a customized invoice, we recommend training individual templates for the best results for extractions data.

Hello Shashank,

You may refer to the following blog for remigration. For the migration process per se, you may refer to this blog.

entry.title: Re: Percentage by dimensions on chart SAP WEBI
entry.content: Thank you for the reply.

entry.title: Any set of rules how to fill SD Table TVWA GoodsReceivingHours?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I just checked the goods receiving hours in our customer data and found that there is a huge variation in how my colleagues filled the fields.

1st question:
Are there any rules defined by SAP on how to fill these fields? I couldn´t find anything within the helping sections.

2nd question:
I have an excel export for the fieds. Is there a possibility to change the times in the excel sheet and to import it back to SAP?

Thanks in advanced!😍
Christian

Here is an example how the monday is used in our customer data: 
H: WAMOAB1
I: WAMOBI1
J: WAMOAB2
K: WAMOBI2

entry.title: Cloud Application Programming Model OData v2 proxy
entry.content:
I am running a cap backend application with express.js and want to access the odata services with v2. In this project I used the @sap/cds-odata-v2-adapter-proxy which is now deprecated. The recommended package is now @sap-js-community/odata-v2-adapter.

I tried to implement the proxy in the same way as the deprecated proxy. It did not work and I did not get any error messages.

This is my server.js:

 

const express = require('express');
const proxy = require('@sap-js-community/odata-v2-adapter');
const cds = require('@sap/cds');
const app = express();
const bodyParser = require('body-parser');

app.use(proxy());
app.use(bodyParser.json());

(async () => {
  await cds.serve('TestService').in(app).at('/test');

  app.listen(process.env.PORT || 4004);
})();

entry.title: Re: no access to SAP Build Apps Lobby via subaccount
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for reaching out to us. Are you still encountering the login issue? Could you please reconfirm that all the SAP Build Apps roles are assigned for the custom identity provider for your applications? If the issue persists, kindly share a screenshot of the user trust configuration for further investigation

entry.title: Re: SAC - ​Is it possible that Range Slider directly implemente without editing scripts?
entry.content: yes , can you share some sample code to link a calculated measure and range slider

entry.title: Patch operation in SAP Netweaver SCIM
entry.content:
Hello,

Hello,
we have on-premise SAP NetWeaver instance with SCIM provisioning enabled as it's described here- SCIM Vanilla Application for AS Java | SAP Help Portal It's working correctly and we are able to create and update users and groups via GET and PUT API methods. Unfortunately with SCIM interface PUT operations means 'overwrite' and I need to have a method to update only user password without editing other fields. Based on that I thought that using PATCH operation with below body would be a good option:

 

{
"schemas": [
"urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp"
],
"Operations": [
{
"op": "replace",
"path": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User:password",
"value": "NewPassword123!"
}
]
}

Unfortunately once trying to use it I get 'Internal Server Error.'. I think it's because currently in /scim/v2/ServiceProviderConfig endpoint I get reply that Patch is not supported. 

Does anyone know if it is possible to enable PATCH for NetWeaver? If so then where I can do it.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Percentage by dimensions on chart SAP WEBI
entry.content: Thank you for the reply. Yes, you're right - the break can be used especially in table. However, would there be any context operator for the chart?

entry.title: Re: Loop/Iterate in the SAP Build Process Autoamtion Process flow
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for reaching out to us. Currently, there is no direct loop functionality available within the process. To achieve this, you may need to use Automation within the process

entry.title: INSTALLATION CRYSTAL REPORT
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have already installed sap crystal report in my PC client after I reinstalled the crystal, I completed all the installation steps and it shows that "the installation is complete" but if I want to run the program it is not displayed anywhere in the desktop and even if in the control panel;

Any ideas?

Regards

SAP Crystal Reports SAP Business One

entry.title: Re: Advanced Variant Configuration (AVC)
entry.content:
Hi Pranav

Good document

Need one correction : Create Class is CL01 it is mentioned as CL04 which is delete Class T code.

Regards

Vignesh V

entry.title: Re: Article Basic Data Text LTEXT_GRUN is not being copied from Generic to Variant.
entry.content:
Read 3479584 - Purchase order text (LTEXT_GRUN) is not copied from a Generic Article to it's Variant  

@arin2018  I'm afraid the first paragraph of the solution contains bad news for you. 'The only reference handling existing for long texts is from an explicit reference article to a newly created article...' so you may be required to look for some BAdI to trigger update.

@liamaurer but this may be your solution as you refer to a note relevant for newly created article.

entry.title: Plan your agenda for TechEd Virtual
entry.content:
It’s time to start planning your agenda for SAP TechEd Virtual! Head over to the TechEd Virtual dashboard to begin organizing your sessions: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/virtual/flow/sap/te24/dashboard/page/dashboard

To help you get started, here are a few recommendations that might be useful:

Keynote & Developer Keynote

By default, the Keynote is automatically added to your list of scheduled sessions. This session offers a high-level overview of the latest innovations and cool new developments from SAP. It also provides valuable insights into SAP's future strategy.

However, don’t overlook the Developer Keynote! This is another essential session to include in your TechEd Virtual agenda. Unlike the main keynote, the Developer Keynote is all about diving deep into the technical aspects. If you're keen on hands-on technical insights and want a closer look at the latest tools and developments, this session is a must!

 

Prioritize your interests

Next, start by applying a filter to narrow down the list of sessions to those that align with your interests. This should be your priority, focusing on sessions that offer updates and new insights in areas you’re passionate about or working on. Once you’ve locked in these key sessions, you can fill any gaps in your schedule with other sessions that catch your eye or topics you’d like to explore further.

Personally, I selected the following tracks as a filter:

 

Maximize your schedule

Once you’ve selected all the sessions that match your interests, it’s time to fill any gaps in your schedule. Head to your dashboard and identify where those gaps are in your list of scheduled sessions. Then, browse the session catalog to find additional sessions that fit those time slots. Choose the ones that seem most interesting or relevant to you.

For example, I had a gap between 10:30 am and 11:00 am on the first day:

Remove all the filters:

And look at the sessions available at that time. I filled this gap with the Keynote recap + Community welcome:

 

Plan backup sessions

It's a good idea to plan backup sessions in case your scheduled session doesn't meet your expectations. By having an alternative ready, you can easily switch if needed. While scheduling a backup session at the same time will create a conflict, you can simply keep the one you prefer and mark the backup as a favorite. This allows you to quickly jump to it if needed, or catch the replay afterward.

Many sessions will focus on Joule, both as an AI assistant for our business and as a powerful tool for developers. I’m really excited to explore all the new innovations Joule has to offer. It’s definitely something to keep an eye on during SAP TechEd Virtual! (though it will be hard to miss! 😊)

Be sure to join the SAP TechEd community group to connect and network with fellow community members. Also, don’t forget to sign up for Devtoberfest for even more learning and fun!

 

If you’re feeling overwhelmed by virtual sessions, consider attending SAPInsider EMEA in Copenhagen, which is partnering with TechEd on Tour: https://reg.eventmobi.com/emea-2024. Tom Cenens and I will be presenting a session on BTP titled “Key Strategies for Effective SAP BTP Administration and Governance.” It’s a great opportunity to connect in person and dive deep into BTP strategies!

Cheers,

Weerakhan T.

entry.title: Re: AI capabilities in SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content:
I mean, you don't help us a lot if you don't answer ALL the questions asked by Raymond:

@raymond_giuseppi wrote:

Is an application log available in SLG1 or in transaction V_SA?
Are pop-up windows displayed during interactive execution?
Did you already look for OSS notes?
Are other Customer Exit/BAdI/User Exit active that would check sy-batch or require a GUI connexion?

entry.title: Re: Numeric Point
entry.content:
Hello @nutpos,

It's possible to have two data sources in one numeric point widget. One disadvantage is that the linked dimension needs to be part of the blended visualisation. It works if this dimension is used in trellies for instance:

It's recommended to filter on a single value to avoid having more than one numeric graph then. 😉

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Plan your agenda for TechEd Virtual
entry.content: @WouterLemaire great advice, great tips. With so much great content many probably scratch their head 'where and how do I get started?' The track leads are sharing information too -which may be extremely useful to many! Also, for everyone to check out! Real Talk with SAP TechEd Track Leads - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Manage Substitution/Validation Rules – Journal Entries: A Guide to Business Contexts and Rules
entry.content:
Hello Bilal, 

Thank you for your question. The rules in Fiori would not show up in the GB0 and OB28 (Validation) transactions. I hope this helps. 

Ciara

entry.title: External and in-hous procurement
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to setup the following process:

1. Buy finished good A

2. Execute one operation with finished good A, adding some costs. Material ID should be the same.

3. Sell it

-------------------------------------------

So I have created BOM for "Material A" including "Material A" in the BOM as Recursive item. 

The process looks like:

1. Create ProdOrd for Material A. As result I receive OrderReserv for Material A ->>>it is ok.

2. Run MRP. As a result PlanOrd is created to cover the OrderReservation ->>> The system behavior is clear. But my requirement in this step is: to receive PurchRequisition instead of Planned order.

----------------------------------------

One option which I already have is to use Non-stock item in the BOM. In this case PurchReq is created. But the problem is that when execute Prod. order confirmation (CO11N), it is not possible automatically   backflash it, since it is Non-stock item.

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: Project Settlement Process
entry.content:
Hi Mohammed

In response to your first question, if the business rule is to settle directly to the asset, you should avoid using an "investment measure." This means you should not assign an investment profile to the WBS element. Instead, manually create the asset and include it in the settlement rule.

As for your second question, while the "balance" will be zero after settlement, the "incurred cost" will still be reflected.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Variant Configuration Simple Method Step by Step
entry.content:
Hi Raghu,

Good documentation on SAP VC Process.

Class creation : CL01 followed by CL02

Also BoM applicable components based on CU41 condition - t code : CU50 can be added.

Keep going best wishes.

Vignesh V

entry.title: What means the parameter SAP_07
Re: S/4 HANA Product compliance - Safety Data Sheet creat...

entry.title: Re: Error CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST API
entry.content: Let's say you have fetched the token into your variable MY_TOKEN, then you should call lo_http_client->set_csrf_token( MY_TOKEN ). How do you want the request to contain the token otherwise? NB: I don't know the method SET_CSRF_TOKEN of CL_HTTP_CLIENT, it doesn't exist in 7.40 SP8. By the way, I can't read correctly the code in your question, it's badly formatted, that would be great if you edit your question and format the code as explained in the link given above.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Belgium 2024
entry.content: Same for me. Hope to be able to be present next year.

entry.title: Re: RAP Unamanged - Modify Response content after POST
entry.content:
Hi @nicmon I've been facing the same issue trying to create a Fiori Application on top of an entity which has late numbering ( in my case I am using I_EquipmentTP ). 

The problem with late numbering is that a number is only assigned in the save phase, more precisely in the adjust_numbers method of the TP entity. If you look at the RAP Save Sequence you will see that the adjust_numbers is the first method of 'the point of no return' in the RAP Framework - https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/save-sequence-runtime .

Now you can take a look and find the syntax of CONVERT KEY OF ... statement which is shown in one of their RAP workshops here - https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-rap-workshops/blob/main/rap6xx/rap610/exercises/ex4/README.md#exercise-44-add-the-convert-key-statement-to-your-local-saver-class and think - yes this is what I need to get the %PID ( preliminary ID ) of the object and get the actual number, but unfortunately the only point you're allowed to call CONVERT KEY OF is directly in the SAVE method and not before that or after that.

In cases of a Web API that's fine because in the end you can add a reported success message and retrieve the newly created number of the object in a sap-message header, but that's no good when comes to Fiori Applications. If you have such an object, then a object with empty ID is generated by the application.

That's why you can see examples with people building custom RAP BOs with persistent tables underneath so they can manage the RAP BO as a standalone entity 'linked' to the standard BO through the table, because there is no other way. E.g. - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-i-journalentrytp-in-custom-rap-bo/ba-p/13581164

I think that's a major gap in the RAP Framework that has to be probably addressed, but unfortunately I do not know the right person to do so. 

I've thought for a very unpleasing workaround that I can suggest: 

If you don't want the overhead of entire custom table ( as shown in the example ) to store your BOs, perhaps consider creating a custom field on the main BO and storing a 'dummy ID' generated by you there. Instead of the main object ID (e.g. Sales Order Number ) use the new dummy ID as a key for your entities. In your child entities make a select from the main entity with a join so you can use the dummy ID as a key there instead of the standard key, since that won't be available on creation. 

Basically change the key from the standard one to a custom one that you manage yourself and store it as a custom entity, this key will be managed by the application and it will only be used there, for any other operations (.e.g standard Sales Order application ) the entity will be already existing with the normal number.

entry.title: Re: Transfer data from one internal table to another without loop with some conditions
entry.content: Basic ABAP. Learn what operations are possible for internal tables in the official ABAP documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abentable_processing_statements.htm

entry.title: App return to PIN/FingerPrint page when trying to add attachment or display photo in an external app
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if there is a way to prevent the app from returning to the pin/fingerprint page when add an attachment or display image via OpenDoc in an external app.

For example In the ShowCase Image Handling App you can add attachment and also show image via Open Doc. When perform those actions, the app for every image opened and every attachment attached return to the pin/fingerprint page. This is really annoying when you need to add multiple attachments in sequence and need to show multiple images. 

How I can prevent this problem ?

Thank you.

Thank you.

In V4 it is possible using the "sectionLayout": "Tabs" setting.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Belgium 2024
entry.content: Sadly have to cancel as well.

entry.title: Re: Assembly Processing (PS)
entry.content:
Hi all..

I identified the issue in the program. Since I am using a training system rather than a client system, I cannot open a ticket with SAP, but I’m sharing the details here in case it can help others.

In the code for the FM CJWB_ELEMENTS_COPY, specifically at line 147, the FORM EINB_WINDOW_INPUT is invoked. Within this FORM, on line 110, a SELECT is made from the PRPS table, targeting the PSPHI field, and assigning the result to the variable L_PSPHI, using the field PSPNR as a criterion. However, the value in the variable RCWKP-DANEBEN (used as filter) refers to the POSID of the standard WBS element, which causes the selection to always return empty. I believe there are two issues here:

  1. Attempting to select a WBS element from the table when the operational project hasn’t been physically created yet.
  2. Using a standard WBS element code to search in a table for operational WBS elements.
    Because of this, the selection for the PROFL field in the PROJ table, which should occur at line 113, never happens. As you can see on image 1.


The values required for the variables L_PSPHI and L_PROFL are already in memory. Therefore, running the selection is unnecessary. These values are already present in the PRPS and PROJ structures, specifically in the PRPS-PSPHI and PROJ-PROFL fields. When debugging the program and halting at line 115, if you replace the values of L_PSPHI and L_PROFL with those from PRPS-PSPHI and PROJ-PROFL, the error is resolved, and the process continues without issues. As you can see on images 2, 3 and 4.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Disable or remove permissions for the Introductory Te...

entry.title: #03 - Setting Clear Objectives: The Foundational Digital Transformation
entry.content:
When embarking on an SAP implementation project, one of the most critical steps is to set clear objectives. These objectives will not only guide your project but also help you measure its success once completed. Here’s how to establish those objectives effectively and ensure that everyone involved is aligned with the project’s goals.

Why Clear Objectives Matter

Setting clear objectives is essential because it defines what you want to achieve with your SAP implementation. These objectives provide direction and purpose, allowing your team to focus on what truly matters. Without clear objectives, projects can drift off course, leading to wasted time, resources, and ultimately, a lack of tangible results.

Moreover, having a well-defined set of objectives allows you to establish success criteria. By knowing what success looks like from the outset, you can create a measurement plan to track progress and evaluate the project's outcomes against the initial goals.

Aligning Stakeholders with Project Expectations

One of the most common pitfalls in any project is misalignment among stakeholders. It’s crucial that all stakeholders understand the expectations of the project from the beginning. This includes not only the technical aspects of the implementation but also the broader business transformation goals.

Introducing SAP Value Management Framework

The help you identify key value drivers, measure their impact with precise KPIs, and optimize through continuous improvement.

 

The SAP Value Lifecycle Manager (VLM) is a key accelerator used by SAP for value management service delivery. This tool is publicly accessible and provides a range of valuable features for both customers and partners Benchmarking Surveys, Business Case Development and Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) Analysis. The VLM tool enables you to evaluate your processes and key performance indicators (KPIs), helping you discover the value of the Intelligent Enterprise. It’s powered by best-in-class value content and insights, making it an invaluable resource for setting clear, actionable objectives.

VLM will soon also be covering the value of AI to further improve business process excellence.

The Broader Perspective: Digital Transformation

<Coming soon 2024-10-01>

Conclusion: A Mindset for Success

The mindset you bring to your SAP implementation project is crucial. By defining a clear North Star and operational objectives, you will get all stakeholders aligned and significantly increase the odds that your Digital and AI transformation will deliver high business value within time and budget. Remember, this is not just a technical upgrade—it's an opportunity to transform your entire business. Keep your goals clear, your team focused, and your eyes on the long-term value that SAP can deliver.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Check out other blogs from the series   Customer Onboarding at SAP
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Error while calling APIs from Build Process Automation
entry.content:
We are using Build Process Automation on BTP and downloaded the project Inactive Vendor Mark for Blockage or Deletion from the Store and trying to implement it. We have made the required configurations and created destinations, but facing error in Automation to Fetch Finance Document Details, while testing the automation: "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '__count')".  Please suggest.

Gave input as below

Error:

{
    "uid": "bd0d2b28-30f1-4897-a408-c653f4289b40",
    "name": "Automation to Fetch Finance Document Details",
    "type": "automation",
    "instanceUid": "b6f019e3-582e-4393-ba6c-49d257822f1e",
    "packageUid": "5d081521-2d4e-4b5a-88eb-f589fbc396ef",
    "packageVersionUid": "b533a81e-af05-45fd-9896-82b8aac16acb",
    "attended": true,
    "duration": 3,
    "status": "Failed",
    "code": "KO",
    "label": "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '__count')",
    "containerInstanceUid": "b6f019e3-582e-4393-ba6c-49d257822f1e",
    "parentInstanceUid": "8cdba4ef-3d44-28ad-9193-8c4005ccc152",
    "line": 2,
    "file": "bundle.js",
    "exception": "irpa_core.error.Error",
    "stack": "Error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '__count')    at e.error.cast (C:\Users\tbandaru\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\973e2db6-6d85-4b76-9646-22b67e2a275b\dist\bundle.js:2:208641)    at t.Job.start (C:\Users\tbandaru\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\973e2db6-6d85-4b76-9646-22b67e2a275b\dist\bundle.js:2:303965)    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)"
}

entry.title: Re: SAP BO 4.2 SP05: Windows Server OS Upgrade From 2008...
entry.content: Yes, that is possible. See this kb article for info: https://me.sap.com/notes/0001899321

entry.title: Re: KBA 3452616 bank migration
entry.content: Creating a new planning level will depend upon your business requirement.

entry.title: Re: App return to PIN/FingerPrint page when trying to add...
entry.content:
The display of the passcode page upon returning is controlled by the Lock Timeout setting.  This value controls how long you can be "away" from the client before you are prompted to input your passcode again.  By default the timeout is zero which means everytime you switch to another app (including adding attachments, taking pictures) you will be prompted to enter it again.

To change this value go to your app in Mobile Services and under Mobile Settings Exchange you can set the Lock Timeout value. The value is the number of seconds the client can be in the background before prompting for passcode again.

I typically set mine to 300 which gives me 5 minutes to take a picture or add an attachment.

entry.title: SAP Entitlement Management Webcast 10/10/24: Increase Recurring Revenue for Subscriptions, XaaS
entry.content:
Join our SAP Entitlement Management (EMS) Webcast on Oct 10, 2024.

Learn how SAP Entitlement Management can help increase recurring revenue and profitability and smoothly transition from selling products to selling solutions, subscriptions and XaaS (Everything -as-a-Service).

SAP Entitlement Management
SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management 
SAP Subscription Billing 
RISE with SAP

entry.title: Re: Unable to create Phone Calls in SAP Service Cloud V2...
entry.content:
Hi Syed Muheeed,

The issue you're experiencing when attempting to create Phone Call entities using the Data Import functionality in SAP Service Cloud V2 could be due to several reasons.

 Firstly,Check Data Mapping and ensure that the CSV file you're using for import has all the required fields mapped correctly to the Phone Call entity fields in SAP Service Cloud. 

 Secondly, check mandatory Fields and Verify that all mandatory fields for the Phone Call entity, such as phone number, start date, end date, and related contact/account information, are filled in your data file.

Then, Check data Format,make sure that the data in your CSV file follows the correct format expected by the system. For example, dates should be in the correct format, and any ID fields should match the existing records in SAP.

After that,Check if your user role has the necessary permissions to create Phone Call entries via the data import functionality. 

If there are no issues mentioned above , Review the SAP Service Cloud import logs (if available) to see detailed error messages. This will provide more information on the root cause of the issue and can guide you to the exact problem.

All are perfect but still error means ,Contact SAP Support If the issue persists after these checks, I recommend contacting SAP Support or checking the SAP Knowledge Base for known issues with the Data Import functionality in Service Cloud V2.

entry.title: SAC OData - How to connect API with Authentication Bearer
entry.content:
Hi everyone, can someone help me find a solution!

We have some devices called "TERM", used mainly to collect data. These data are saved in a MDM platform (Mobile Device Management). Our objective is to extract these data from MDM into SAP Analytics Cloud for reporting purpose.

The manufacturer of TERM give access to these data only through API (Application Programming Language). He gave us : (1) URL that points to the MDM and (2) Authentication bearer which is a token used normally in the coding part.

While trying to connect this to SAC, we figure out that SAC doesn't support natively this kind of API (OData connection). See "OData connection - Authentication type" list image below. None of OData connection allow us to enter the Authentication Bearer as parameter..

Since the objective is to send data in SAC, preferably in form of Data Model, can someone help me find out how this can be done in SAC please ?

By the way, API Url + Anthentication Bearer have been tested and work perfectly in Postman.

Thank you in advance for your help !

Jean-Yves.

entry.title: SAP analytics cloud imputcontrol date-type
entry.content: Hello, I have some InputControls with date-type data. I need a button to remove them, but InputControl only allows me to modify members that are of type string.

#sap #ERP

entry.title: how to get all the dates enetered in the date range prompt in webi report even if not in DB table
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using Webi and IDT 4.2 SP9.

I have two Database tables called Ttawc_Task_Work_Summary and AMS_Project_master.
In my IDT universe, to fulfull some requirement, a derived table based on these two tables is created as below:

SELECT  A.* , B.PRACTICE_GROUP

FROM TTAWC_TASK_WORK_SUMMARY A , AMS_PROJECT_MASTER B where A.FFF=B.FFF(+) AND A.close_date between B.EFF_FROM_DATE(+) and B.EFF_TO_DATE(+)and A.Close_Date BETWEEN to_date( @Prompt('1.From Date','D',,,)) and to_date( @Prompt('2.To Date','D',,,))

I have one more Database table called AMS_Employee_Master which is present in my universe and linked with the above mentioned Derived table as below:

"TTAWC_TASK_WORK_SUMMARY_Drvd".EMPLOY_ID=AMS_EMPLOYEE_MASTER.EMPLOYEE_CODE(+)
Cardinality set is (n,1)

Attached here is the sample of Ttawc_Task_Work_Summary table which is run for 9th to 21st sept 2024 just for two employ_Id: 210215 & 200291

If u see the excel, user 210215 has filled efforts from 9th to 12th Sept only
and user 200291 filled efforts for 9th to 15th Sept only.
So in excel, you will see only those Close_Dates for which user has filled efforts.

Now, the requirement is to create a webi report and find the dates for which the user has not filled efforts.

I need 4 columns in my report:
1. Employee_No: It will come from TTAWC_TASK_WORK_SUMMARY_Drvd table that I created above. I already created Business layer, Classes and objects and getting Employee_No in my report.

2. Entry date: It will also come from TTAWC_TASK_WORK_SUMMARY_Drvd table that I created above. I already created Business layer, Classes and objects and getting Entry_date in my report.
Employee_Name: it will come AMS_employee_master its already there in my report coming from Business layer.
Designation: : it will come AMS_employee_master its already there in my report coming from Business layer.

Now, the requirement is to create a webi report and find the dates for which the user has not filled efforts.

When I execute, webi report, It prompts for date range and Employee_ID,IF I enter
Date tange:9thSep2024 to 21st Sep2024
Employee Id: 210215 ; 200291
  it should show me only the dates for which user has not filled efforts.
So I need to see those dates only in my webi report, for which effort is not filled by the employee Ids entered in the prompt.

So here, as per the excel u see attached and prompt I entered for date range and user Id the webi report should show  the dates for which user has not filled efforts.
Attached Effort_gap_Details.xlsx is the output I need in report after entering the prompt I mentioned above and here below as well:

Prompt Date range:9thSep2024 to 21st Sep2024
Prompt Employee Id: 210215 ; 200291

Don’t give summary of any table sample attached.
Please help me with the way I can achieve this in webi report by creating variables or any other way  at report level.

since xlsx file is not allowed to attach above is Ttawc_task_Work_summary_sample data

and expected output is aatched below:

entry.title: Re: Project Settlement Process

entry.title: Pixelated / Low Resolution Image in the Image Control
entry.content:
Hi,

we have an external service that generates URL referred to product images.

In the Avatar of Products Object Table we set the URL returned from the OData:

 

Spoiler
"AvatarStack": {
"Avatars": [
  {
      "Image": "{Url}"
  } ],
"ImageIsCircular": false,
"ImageHasBorder": false },

Result:

In the detail product page I have an Image Control that refers to the same URL of the Product Object Table.

 

 

Spoiler
"_Type": "Section.Type.Image",
"_Name": "SectionImage0",
"Visible": true,
"Image": "{Url}",
"Alignment": "Center",
"ContentMode": "ScaleAspectFit"

 

Result:

The image generated from the service, have an high resolution but when we try to show it in the image control, it showed in a bad resolution.

If we try to open the same image using the same URL via Open Doc the image show a way better.

Result:

I tried to render again the page with Image Control but the result was the same.

How I can resolve this issue ?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAC Story - align tables to move dynamically
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have panel with filters on the top of the page which can expand/collapse. Below it I have table which I want to move up once the filter panel is collapsed (to be aligned to the bottom side of this filter panel) so it won't have blank space between both once it is collapsed.

Is it possible somehow to do that?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Reporting on Ask for Feedback Content?
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I was looking to create an ad hoc table report in Report Center to view the content of feedback responses from the Ask for Feedback Function in Performance Management. I came across this KBA on "Reporting on Ask for Feedback Information - Performance Management", where it mentions:

At this time, the content of the feedback received is not yet included in Ad hoc reports. An existing enhancement request is now under Review and Develop Phase for this feature. Please follow the request to get the latest updates on this enhancement request.

When I follow the enhancement request it shows this enhancement has been delivered as part of 1H 2022 Story Reporting. We've recently enabled story reports but have not had much experience creating them, and also don't seem to have much luck reporting out large amounts of data. Does anyone have any resources they can share for how to report out on this?

Thank you so much in advance!
Geena

entry.title: Re: CIC Support Webcasts
entry.content: Nice work Claire

entry.title: Splitting Ordinary Time into three Valuations
entry.content:
Hi there,

We are pretty new to Time Sheet and Time Valuations, still very much learning. We have a scenario where we need to be able to split up the overall clocked in hours into three possible valuation groups:

  • Ordinary Time - should equate to the planned hours for an employee based on their work schedule
  • Time Off In Lieu (TOIL) - time recorded outside Ordinary time should be converted to TOIL – up to 29 mins. 
  • Overtime: After 30 mins, the employee becomes eligible for paid overtime, for those first 30 mins (which should now no longer be converted to TOIL) and for every 15 minute increment after that. Any recorded minutes that do not fill a 15 minute increment are to be valuated as TOIL instead.

Please see different examples of scenarios below on how we are wanting to split the valuation up.

Clock In / Clock Out –  Paid overtime (After 30 Mins)
Example A : Scheduled Planned Hours 7.45 (ACTUALLY worked -  8.14)
7.45 Ordinary Time
29 Min TOIL

Example B: Scheduled Planned Hours 7.45 (ACTUALLY worked 8.44)
7.45 Ordinary Time
45 Min Paid Overtime
14 Min TOIL

Example C: Scheduled Planned Hours 7.45 (ACTUALLY worked 8.45)
7.45 Ordinary Time
1 Hour Paid Overtime

Example 😧 Scheduled Planned Hours 7.45 (ACTUALLY worked 8.46)
7.45 Ordinary Time
1 Hour Paid Overtime
1 Min TOIL 

We are trying to understand if this configuration is possible. If so, is it possibly rules we need to look at and what parameters should we be using?

 

Kind Regards,

Aoife

entry.title: How can we add entry in TKEVG table ?
entry.content:
Hello,

Hello,

 

I have an issue on settlement, KD514.  I configured custom PA transfer structure Z1 but the system always takes the PA transfer structure FI - Direct FI/MM.

I saw that I need to change an entry in TKEVG, but I don't have entry. How can I add an entry ?

Thank you

Regards

Maxime

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/issue-in-pa-transfer-structure-copa/qaq-p/7657651

entry.title: Re: Currency Exchange Rate Integration to S/4HANA Public...
entry.content:
Refer to the Datafeed help portal link

The set-up instruction for SAP Market Rates Management, Refinitiv data option. 

and, SAP Market Rates Management, Bring Your Own Rates data option 

The currency notations are defined in the App Assign Currency Notations - Datafeed

Regards,
Bhawesh
